tasks.title: Init package (package.json, tsconfig, deps: commander/gray-matter/zod + dev vitest/prettier/tsx)
Wire commander CLI entry (src/cli.ts) with --help/--version
Domain types (src/domain/types.ts) for 4 entities + ParsedUseCase
Agent envelope builders (src/envelope.ts) + unit tests

phases.title: Parser / serializer with round-trip
phases.gate: for every fixture F: serialize(parse(F))===normalize(F) AND normalize(normalize(F))===normalize(F)

tasks.title: Frontmatter parse/stringify (gray-matter) + zod schemas, fixed key order
Body parser: blurb/interests/preconditions/trigger/steps/extensions/guarantees/notes
Serializer: canonical order, renumbered steps, single trailing newline
normalize() + idempotence
Fixture corpus (tests/fixtures/usecases/) covering edge cases

phases.title: doctor (offline validation)
phases.gate: one red fixture per error rule + a clean fixture passes; `vspec doctor` on clean dir exits 0

tasks.title: Validation engine: one check per Cockburn rule, findings {rule,level,message,location}
Cross-reference checks (primary_actor, step actors, stakeholders resolve to files)
format-aware required-field enforcement (error@FULLY_DRESSED, warn otherwise)
vspec doctor [KEY|path] command + agent envelope (VALIDATION_FAILED)

phases.title: Use-case authoring (dogfood loop core)
phases.gate: e2e: init -> usecase create -> file round-trips and doctor reports no errors

tasks.title: vspec init [--key]: write .vspec/config.json + specs/ subdirs, idempotent
vspec usecase create: allocate key, slug, BRIEF skeleton, honor --from
vspec usecase list / show from files
Key allocation helper (src/keys.ts) shared by usecase & goal

phases.title: Actors, stakeholders, goals + body-authoring gateway
phases.gate: e2e: build a FULLY_DRESSED use case entirely via CLI; doctor exits 0 with no warnings

tasks.title: actor & stakeholder create/list/show (file CRUD, ALREADY_EXISTS guard)
goal create/list/show/promote/reject (promote links + creates use case)
usecase set (frontmatter field, re-serialize through normalize)
usecase apply [--section] body-authoring gateway (parse + validate + normalize on write)

phases.title: Agent envelope across commands + ai-guide
phases.gate: each command's --format=agent emits a valid envelope with non-empty suggested_next_actions; KEY_NOT_FOUND path returns right code + recovery

tasks.title: Thread --format through every command; map errors to stable codes
Populate suggested_next_actions (success + error) per cli-spec examples
vspec ai-guide: end-to-end authoring walkthrough

phases.title: Gherkin export
phases.gate: golden-file test: fixture use case renders byte-for-byte to expected .feature

tasks.title: Gherkin renderer (Feature/Background/Main/Extensions/outcome)
vspec export gherkin <KEY> [--output]; agent envelope with affected_files

phases.title: Dogfooding
phases.gate: vspec doctor exits 0 over specs/; every file round-trips; a .feature per use case; fresh-agent task succeeds

tasks.title: vspec init --key VSPEC at repo root
Author >=5 real use cases for this project (+ referenced actors/stakeholders)
vspec doctor over whole tree exits 0
vspec export gherkin <KEY> for each
Fresh-agent check: author one use case from only `vspec ai-guide`
